questions.question: What is the primary purpose of market segmentation?
options: To divide a market into smaller groups with similar needs
To reduce the number of competitors

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of primary research?
What does USP stand for in marketing?
Which pricing strategy involves setting a high price when launching a new product?
What is the main goal of promotion in the marketing mix?
Which of the following is an example of a demographic factor?
What is penetration pricing?
options: Setting a high price to maximise early profits
Setting a low price to enter a competitive market
Charging different prices to different customers
Setting prices based on production cost

questions.question: Which element of the marketing mix refers to how a product is delivered to customers?
What is branding mainly used for?
options: To differentiate a product from competitors
